title: botryanthus commutatus
intro: Botryanthus commutatus, also known as the common rein orchid or rein orchid, is a flowering plant species belonging to the orchid family. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine to treat various health issues, including inflammation, fever, and respiratory problems, due to its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant is believed to offer several health benefits, such as reducing pain and swelling, improving respiratory function, and boosting the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often dried and used as a tea or infused in oil to create topical applications, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness.
